Value and above are deferred inside a batch (DATA/RESOLVED/INVALIDATE/terminal/teardown).

## Import

```ts
import { isDeferredTier } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Signature

```ts
function isDeferredTier(t: MessageType): boolean
```
